author: Sangharakshita
title: Contents of Auckland Questions and Answers - March 1979
content:
The Venerable Sangharakshita

Question and Answer Evening in Auckland, New Zealand
20th March 1979


Contents


2 The FWBO in India
Provisional and Effective Going for Refuge
5 The New Zealand 'Jack-in-the-box' fundraising project
Tyn-y-Ddol (Vajraloka)
6 Dhardo Rimpoche's school
7 Dhardo Rimpoche's 'Bodhisattva-like' nature
When to teach children meditation and Dharma
8 What happens to an Enlightened being's consciousness after death/at rebirth?
Continuity of consciousness
9 Is the FWBO a Mahayana movement?
10 Criteria for Going for Refuge
11 The scope in the movement for many different types of people
12 Families and the WBO
13 Psychology and Buddhist Psychology
Avoiding religious terminology
14 Relating the Dharma to one's own life.
